data.src_id: Flange Edge-to-Flange Edge Dimensions for Largest Opening
data.content:
largest opening,ring joint groove	Flange Edge-to-Flange Edge Dimensions for Largest Opening
dimension calculation
For the center-to-end dimensions of reducing fittings or end-to-end dimensions of reducers, use center-to-flange edge or flange edge-to-flange edge dimensions for the largest opening, and add the proper height to provide for ring joint groove applying to each flange.

facing dimensions,ring joint	Ring Joint Groove Dimensions

See Table II-5 of Mandatory Appendix II for ring joint facing dimensions.

access provision,data provision,distribution,document distribution,document provider,license,license agreement,licensing,organization,publication,standard document	ASME B16.5-2013
IHS
ASME B16.5-2013 is a standard distributed and licensed by IHS under agreement with ASME International. IHS provides access to this standard document through a licensing arrangement with ASME International. Both ASME B16.5-2013 and its licensed copies are distributed by IHS, ensuring that users have access to the standard under the terms of the license. IHS acts as the distributor and licensor, providing the necessary permissions for the document to be accessed and used. This relationship between ASME B16.5-2013 and IHS involves a clear licensing framework where IHS is responsible for distributing the standard under the terms granted by ASME International.
